lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਭਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sobhaa surat suhaavanee jin har setee chit laaeaa |2|
lines.english: Beautiful and sublime is the glory and the understanding of those who focus their consciousness on the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਰਾ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਚਲਣਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਹਥਾ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: pairaa baajhahu chalanaa vin hathaa karanaa |
lines.english: to walk without feet; to work without hands;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਭੈ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਇਉ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeebhai baajhahu bolanaa iau jeevat maranaa |
lines.english: to speak without a tongue-like this, one remains dead while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਵੇਖਣਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਕੰਨਾ ਸੁਨਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: akhee baajhahu vekhanaa vin kanaa sunanaa |
lines.english: To see without eyes; to hear without ears;

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿ ਕੈ ਤਉ ਖਸਮੈ ਮਿਲਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam pachhaan kai tau khasamai milanaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, recognize the Hukam of the Lord's Command, and merge with your Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਸੈ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: disai suneeai jaaneeai saau na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: He is seen, heard and known, but His subtle essence is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਕਰ ਭਾਵ ਕੇ ਲੋਇਣ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai ke charan kar bhaav ke loein surat karee |
lines.english: Let the Fear of God be your feet, and let His Love be your hands; let His Understanding be your eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਹਲਾ ਟੁੰਡਾ ਅੰਧੁਲਾ ਕਿਉ ਗਲਿ ਲਗੈ ਧਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ruhalaa ttunddaa andhulaa kiau gal lagai dhaae |
lines.english: How can the lame, armless and blind person run to embrace the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਤੂੰ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa toon ek hai tudh doojaa khel rachaaeaa |
lines.english: Forever and ever, You are the only One; You set the play of duality in motion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਸਿਆਣੀਏ ਇਵ ਕੰਤ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kahai siaanee iv kant milaavaa hoe |2|
lines.english: Says Nanak, in this way, O wise soul-bride, you shall be united with your Husband Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਗਰਬੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਲੋਭੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੰਤਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: haumai garab upaae kai lobh antar jantaa paaeaa |
lines.english: You created egotism and arrogant pride, and You placed greed within our beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖੁ ਤੂ ਸਭ ਕਰੇ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau rakh too sabh kare teraa karaaeaa |
lines.english: Keep me as it pleases Your Will; everyone acts as You cause them to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਖੜੇ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik kharre kareh teree chaakaree vin naavai hor na bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Some stand and serve You; without the Name, nothing else pleases them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਬਖਸਹਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਤੁਧੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa bakhaseh mel laihi guramatee tudhai laaeaa |
lines.english: Some are forgiven, and merge with You; through the Guru's Teachings, we are joined to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਹੈ ਇਕਿ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਰਹੇ ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: put kalat kuttanb hai ik alipat rahe jo tudh bhaaeaa |
lines.english: In the midst of children, spouse and relations, some still remain detached; they are pleasing to Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਕਾਰ ਵੇਕਾਰ ਹੈ ਇਕਿ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hor kaar vekaar hai ik sachee kaarai laaeaa |
lines.english: Any other task would be worthless to them-You have enjoined them to Your True Service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹਿ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਹੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ohi andarahu baaharahu niramale sachai naae samaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, they are pure, and they are absorbed in the True Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਇਨੇ ਕੈ ਪਰਬਤਿ ਗੁਫਾ ਕਰੀ ਕੈ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਇਆਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sueine kai parabat gufaa karee kai paanee peaal |
lines.english: I may make a cave, in a mountain of gold, or in the water of the nether regions;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਕੈ ਆਕਾਸੀ ਉਰਧਿ ਰਹਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਭਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kai vich dharatee kai aakaasee uradh rahaa sir bhaar |
lines.english: I may remain standing on my head, upside-down, on the earth or up in the sky;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਗਾ ਰਤਾ ਪੀਅਲਾ ਕਾਲਾ ਬੇਦਾ ਕਰੀ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bagaa rataa peealaa kaalaa bedaa karee pukaar |
lines.english: I may shout out loud, the white, red, yellow and black Vedas;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਕਪੜੁ ਪਹਿਰਾ ਧੋਵਾ ਸਦਾ ਕਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: pur kar kaaeaa kaparr pahiraa dhovaa sadaa kaar |
lines.english: I may totally cover my body with clothes, and wash them continually;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਕੁਚੀਲੁ ਰਹਾ ਮਲੁ ਧਾਰੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hoe kucheel rahaa mal dhaaree duramat mat vikaar |
lines.english: I may even live in dirt and filth. And yet, all this is just a product of evil-mindedness, and intellectual corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਉ ਨਾ ਮੈ ਨਾ ਹਉ ਹੋਵਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa hau naa mai naa hau hovaa naanak sabad veechaar |1|
lines.english: I was not, I am not, and I will never be anything at all! O Nanak, I dwell only on the Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਲਗੀ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੈ ਬਾਹਰਹੁ ਮਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar mail lagee nahee jaanai baaharahu mal mal dhovai |
lines.english: But they are not aware of the filth staining their inner being, while they try and try to wash off the outer dirt.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਤ੍ਰ ਪਖਾਲਿ ਪਖਾਲੇ ਕਾਇਆ ਆਪੇ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: vasatr pakhaal pakhaale kaaeaa aape sanjam hovai |
lines.english: They wash their clothes, and scrub their bodies, and try to practice self-discipline.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਾ ਭੂਲਿ ਪਇਆ ਜਮ ਜਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: andhaa bhool peaa jam jaale |
lines.english: The blind go astray, caught by the noose of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਤੁ ਪਰਾਈ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਘਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: vasat paraaee apunee kar jaanai haumai vich dukh ghaale |
lines.english: They see other people's property as their own, and in egotism, they suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੇ ਨਾਮੋ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam jape naamo aaraadhe naame sukh samaavai |2|
lines.english: They chant the Naam, meditate on the Naam, and through the Naam, they are absorbed in peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਤੁਟੈ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh haumai tuttai taa har har naam dhiaavai |
lines.english: O Nanak, the egotism of the Gurmukhs is broken, and then, they meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: pavarree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਹੰਸਿ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa hans sanjog mel milaaeaa |
lines.english: Destiny has brought together and united the body and the soul-swan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਕੀਆ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tin hee keea vijog jin upaaeaa |
lines.english: He who created them, also separates them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖਹੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਖਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: harakhahu sog vijog upaae khapaaeaa |
lines.english: From sinful pleasures come sorrow, separation, birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਹੁ ਉਠੇ ਰੋਗ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sukhahu utthe rog paap kamaaeaa |
lines.english: From pleasures, arise diseases and the commission of sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖੁ ਭੋਗੇ ਭੋਗੁ ਦੁਖ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh bhoge bhog dukh sabaaeaa |
lines.english: The fools enjoy their pleasures; they must also endure all their pains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਹਥਿ ਨਿਬੇੜੁ ਝਗੜੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hath niberr jhagarr chukaaeaa |
lines.english: The judgement is in the Hands of the True Guru, who puts an end to the argument.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖ ਗਣਤ ਗਣਾਇ ਝਗੜਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh ganat ganaae jhagarraa paaeaa |
lines.english: The fools try to account for their misdeeds, and argue uselessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਮੁਰਦਾਰੁ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr bol muradaar khaae |
lines.english: Telling lies, they eat dead bodies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਗੁ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: karataa kare su hog na chalai chalaaeaa |4|
lines.english: Whatever the Creator does, comes to pass. It cannot be changed by anyone's efforts. ||4||
